name: Steamed Chicken with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chinese rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the back pieces of chicken on a heat-proof plate.
2. Surround them with the rest of the chicken pieces.
3. Insert thin slices of pork sausage between the pieces.
4. Place the breast meat at the bottom, surrounded by the longer-cooking dark meat.
5. Add enough water to the wok so that it won't boil away but remains below the plate.
6. Ensure the food is suspended at least 1 inch above the water level.
7. Cover the wok tightly to capture steam under the lid and allow free circulation around the food.
8. Keep a kettle of water ready for replenishing the steaming liquid if needed; do not pour water onto the food.
Makes 4 to 6 servings
